nodes.name: Resolve Identity (status)
nodes.notes: Calls identity resolver for /status command.

parameters.query: SELECT pi.platform, pi.platform_user_id, pi.username, p.display_name FROM platform_identities pi JOIN persons p ON p.id = pi.person_id WHERE pi.person_id = $1

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify($json.discordResponse.data) }}

nodes.name: Resolve Identity (profile)
nodes.notes: Calls identity resolver for /profile command.

parameters.query: UPDATE persons SET display_name = $1 WHERE id = $2

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({content: 'Display name updated to: **' + $('Merge person_id (profile)').item.json.options.name + '**', flags: 64}) }}

nodes.name: Resolve Identity (link)
nodes.notes: Calls identity resolver for /link command.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO pending_links (code, person_id, platform, expires_at) VALUES ($1, $2, 'discord', $3)

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({content: 'Your link code is: **' + $('Generate Link Code').item.json.verification_code + '**\n\nRun `!link ' + $('Generate Link Code').item.json.verification_code + '` in Telegram within 10 minutes.', flags: 64}) }}

parameters.query: SELECT pl.person_id::text as source_person_id, pl.platform as source_platform FROM pending_links pl WHERE pl.code = $1 AND pl.expires_at > NOW()

parameters.body: {"content":"Code not found or expired. Run `!link` in Telegram to get a new code.","flags":64}
{"content":"These accounts are already linked.","flags":64}

parameters.query: UPDATE platform_identities SET person_id = $1 WHERE person_id = $2
UPDATE conversations SET person_id = $1 WHERE person_id = $2
UPDATE messages SET person_id = $1 WHERE person_id = $2
UPDATE memories SET person_id = $1 WHERE person_id = $2
UPDATE persons SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
DELETE FROM pending_links WHERE code = $1

parameters.body: {"content":"Accounts linked! Your Discord and Telegram identities are now unified.","flags":64}

nodes.name: Resolve Identity (unlink)
nodes.notes: Calls identity resolver for /unlink command.

parameters.query: SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM platform_identities WHERE person_id = $1
DELETE FROM platform_identities WHERE platform = 'discord' AND person_id = $1

parameters.body: {"content":"Unlinked. Your Discord account is now independent. History is preserved under your previous unified profile.","flags":64}
{"content":"No linked account to unlink — you only have one platform connected.","flags":64}
{"content":"Unknown command.","flags":64}

nodes.name: Check Admin Role (link)
nodes.notes: Fetch guild member from Discord REST API to get their roles array. Never use trigger payload roles (Pitfall 4: katerlol doesn't guarantee guild member data).

nodes.name: Evaluate Role (link)
nodes.notes: Checks if the command issuer has the admin role. Carries interaction data forward.

parameters.body: ={"content":"You don't have permission to use admin commands.","flags":64}

nodes.name: RespondUnauthorized (link)
nodes.notes: Sends ephemeral unauthorized reply (flags:64) for non-admin users trying admin-link.

nodes.name: Check Merge Needed
nodes.notes: True path: merge two existing persons. False path: already linked or one/both accounts don't exist yet.

parameters.body: ={"content":"{{ $json.already_linked ? 'These accounts are already linked.' : ($json.discord_missing ? 'Discord user ' + $json.discord_id + ' has no Aerys identity yet — they must send a message first.' : 'Telegram user ' + $json.telegram_id + ' has no Aerys identity yet — they must send a message first.') }}","flags":64}

nodes.name: RespondAdminLinkNoOp
nodes.notes: Handles edge cases: already linked, or one/both accounts don't exist yet.

parameters.query: UPDATE platform_identities SET person_id = $1::uuid WHERE person_id = $2::uuid;

nodes.name: Admin Merge PI
nodes.notes: Re-point all loser's platform_identities to winner person_id.

parameters.query: UPDATE conversations SET person_id = $1::uuid WHERE person_id = $2::uuid;
UPDATE messages SET person_id = $1::uuid WHERE person_id = $2::uuid;
UPDATE memories SET person_id = $1::uuid WHERE person_id = $2::uuid;
UPDATE persons SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1::uuid;

nodes.name: Admin Soft Delete Loser
nodes.notes: Soft-delete the loser person row (Discord is winner). Person data preserved; deleted_at marks as merged.

parameters.query: DELETE FROM pending_links WHERE person_id = $1::uuid;

nodes.name: Admin Delete Pending Links
nodes.notes: Clean up any pending verification codes for the loser person.

nodes.name: Get Discord DM Channel
nodes.notes: Open DM channel with the Discord user. Returns channel.id for sending the notification message.

parameters.jsonBody: {"content":"An admin has linked your Discord account to a Telegram account. Your conversation history is now unified."}

nodes.name: Send Discord DM
nodes.notes: Send DM notification to Discord user. neverError=true: if user has DMs disabled, silently continue.

parameters.text: An admin has linked your Telegram account to a Discord account. Your conversation history is now unified.

nodes.name: Notify Telegram User
nodes.notes: Send Telegram notification. Uses n8n Telegram credential (n8n Variables not licensed, so direct HTTP with token not possible). If user has blocked bot, this will fail — wrapped in error-tolerant flow.

parameters.body: ={"content":"Force-link complete. Discord <@{{ $('Prepare Admin Merge').item.json.discord_id }}> and Telegram {{ $('Prepare Admin Merge').item.json.telegram_id }} are now unified. Both users have been notified.","flags":64}

nodes.name: RespondAdminLink
nodes.notes: Ephemeral admin-only reply confirming the force-link. Shows both IDs.

nodes.name: Check Admin Role (unlink)
nodes.notes: Fetch guild member from Discord REST API to verify admin role for /admin-unlink.

nodes.name: Evaluate Role (unlink)
nodes.notes: Same admin role check pattern as admin-link. Carries interaction data forward.

parameters.body: ={"content":"You don't have permission to use admin commands.","flags":64}

nodes.name: RespondUnauthorized (unlink)
nodes.notes: Sends ephemeral unauthorized reply for non-admin users trying admin-unlink.

nodes.name: Lookup Unlink Target
nodes.notes: COALESCE query always returns 1 row. person_id is NULL if not found, non-null if found.

nodes.name: Check Unlink Found
nodes.notes: True if the platform identity exists. False -> RespondUnlinkNotFound.

parameters.body: ={"content":"No platform identity found for {{ $('Evaluate Role (unlink)').item.json.options.platform }} ID {{ $('Evaluate Role (unlink)').item.json.options.id }}.","flags":64}

nodes.name: RespondUnlinkNotFound
nodes.notes: Ephemeral reply: identity not found for admin-unlink.

parameters.query:
DELETE FROM platform_identities
WHERE platform = $1 AND platform_user_id = $2;

nodes.name: Delete Platform Identity
nodes.notes: Hard-delete the platform_identities row. On next message from this user, identity resolver will create a new person row.

parameters.body: ={"content":"Unlinked {{ $('Evaluate Role (unlink)').item.json.options.platform }} account {{ $('Evaluate Role (unlink)').item.json.options.discord_user || $('Evaluate Role (unlink)').item.json.options.id }}. They will get a new identity on their next message.","flags":64}

nodes.name: RespondAdminUnlink
nodes.notes: Ephemeral admin-only confirmation of force-unlink.

nodes.name: Lookup Both Identities
nodes.notes: Single query using COALESCE subqueries — ALWAYS returns 1 row with NULL for missing identities. Prevents empty-result workflow stop.

nodes.name: Prepare Admin Merge
nodes.notes: Processes 0-2 rows from Lookup Both Identities. Determines merge strategy: winner=Discord, loser=Telegram. Handles missing identities gracefully.

parameters.query:
SELECT core_id, key_label, claim_text, status, locked, confidence
FROM core_claim
WHERE speaker_id = $1::uuid AND status IN ('approved','provisional') AND sensitivity IN ('P2','P3')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN locked THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, confidence DESC
LIMIT 10

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({content: $json.reply, flags: 64}) }}

parameters.query: SELECT core_id::text, claim_text FROM core_claim WHERE speaker_id = $1::uuid AND claim_text ILIKE $2 LIMIT 1

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Merge person_id (memory)').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...ctx, reply: "I couldn't find a memory matching that." } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({content: $json.reply, flags: 64}) }}

parameters.query: SELECT core_id::text, claim_text, locked FROM core_claim WHERE speaker_id = $1::uuid AND claim_text ILIKE $2 LIMIT 1

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Merge person_id (memory)').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...ctx, reply: "I couldn't find a memory matching that." } }];

const ctx = $('Merge person_id (memory)').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...ctx, reply: 'That memory is locked. Use /aerys-correct to update a locked memory, or it cannot be forgotten.' } }];

const ctx = $('Merge person_id (memory)').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...ctx, reply: "Done — I've retracted that memory." } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({content: $json.reply, flags: 64}) }}

parameters.query: SELECT core_id::text, claim_text FROM core_claim WHERE speaker_id = $1::uuid AND claim_text ILIKE $2 LIMIT 1

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Merge person_id (memory)').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...ctx, reply: "I couldn't find a memory matching that." } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({action: 'correct', core_id: $json.core_id, speaker_id: $('Merge person_id (memory)').first().json.person_id, new_value: $('Merge person_id (memory)').first().json.options.value}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Merge person_id (memory)').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...ctx, reply: "Updated — I've noted the correction." } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({content: $json.reply, flags: 64}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Merge person_id (memory)').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...ctx, reply: "Got it — I've added that to what I know about you." } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({content: $json.reply, flags: 64}) }}
